items.title: Filesystem undo for experiments
items.oneliner: Experimental distributed filesystem lets you snapshot, replicate, and roll back whole environments like an undo button for systems.

items.title: sqlite-utils release candidate
items.oneliner: Installable sqlite-utils 4.0rc2 gives Python and CLI workflows a fresh release candidate to test before upgrading production scripts.

items.title: Linux epoll exploit repo
items.oneliner: Proof-of-concept exploit shows a Linux epoll race reaching root, useful for kernel defenders, sandbox researchers, and patch validation.

items.title: Native Generals on Apple devices
items.oneliner: Community port runs Command and Conquer Generals natively on Apple Silicon, iPhone, and iPad with modern rendering.

items.title: Calling Linux from Wine
items.oneliner: Hands-on walkthrough shows how to invoke Linux code inside a Wine process for hybrid app hacks and compatibility tooling.

items.title: TypeScript conditional types explained
items.oneliner: Clear TypeScript tutorial shows distributive conditional types with union transforms you can reuse in real API and permission models.

items.title: Pandoc Lua filters guide
items.oneliner: Official guide shows how to write fast Pandoc Lua filters that transform document ASTs without JSON filter overhead.

items.title: Drone autonomy engineering guide
items.oneliner: Practical quadcopter guide covers modeling, estimation, planning, and control with enough detail to start building autonomous drones.

items.title: Personal ASN setup series
items.oneliner: Beginner-friendly BGP series walks through getting an ASN, owning IP space, and operating your own network edge.

items.title: LLM design system prompt
items.oneliner: Reusable prompt library adds accessibility-aware design rules and procedural skills for higher-quality UI generation with any LLM.
